title: Consiliency protected_source_category descriptor
description: Validates a two-level protected_source_category descriptor emitted by the producer (governed-pipeline) and validated by the consumer (phase-loop): a REQUIRED coarse `category` (one of the canonical execution-flow buckets) plus an OPTIONAL free-form `subtype` carrying the producer's fine governance granularity. The coarse enum below is the hard cross-repo contract; it MUST equal the ids in the `protected_source_categories` registry's `coarse_categories` (a contract test pins this so the two never drift). `subtype` is intentionally a free-form string here -- enum-gating the fine level in the distributed schema would re-couple the fine vocabulary across repos, the anti-pattern this boundary avoids; the registry's `fine_subtypes` list is the canonical fine set for tooling and a later soft/warn validator, not a schema hard-fail.

category.description: The REQUIRED coarse execution-flow bucket. MUST equal one of the ids in loadRegistry('protected_source_categories').coarse_categories.

subtype.description: OPTIONAL fine governance granularity from the producer. Free-form string (the registry's fine_subtypes list is the canonical set, checkable by a later validator as a soft signal only, not enforced here).
